title: Male Soccer Player Character Rigged and Animated

image_description.title: Male Soccer Player Character Rigged and Animated
image_description.description: Included animation of Idle, Walking, Running etc. It's full compatible with Mixamo RIG. This character model comes in 3 levels of detail: low-poly for mobile games, mid-poly for standard games, and high-poly for cinematics. The model is fully rigged and ready for animation. It includes PBR textures (4096x4096), including diffuse, normal maps, and metallic/roughness maps. The character is provided in T-pose and can be easily imported into any modern game engine or 3D software. Perfect for games, animations, or virtual reality applications. Please like and comment if you find this model useful!
